name: Dematerialize
description: You target a creature within a short (10 unit) distance and attempt to unravel their physical form. If your spell check beats the target's endurance, they take 15 true damage. If your spell check doubles the target's endurance, the damage is doubled. If this spell reduces a creature to 0 health, they are completely disintegrated, leaving no body behind.
charge: The base damage increases to 30 true damage.
